fieldServiceInspection.name: Field Service Inspection
fieldServiceInspection.description: On-site equipment inspection workflow with checklist, condition rating, and customer sign-off.

requirements.operationalRequirement: Technician must identify the customer and job site.
requirements.formFieldOrBehavior: Customer Name and Job Site fields.
requirements.validationRule: Customer Name and Job Site are required.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Submitted JSON includes customer and location context for internal tracking.

requirements.operationalRequirement: Technician must record equipment and job context.
requirements.formFieldOrBehavior: Equipment Type, Inspection Type, Service Date, and Technician Name fields.
requirements.validationRule: Core job context fields are required.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Internal summary identifies what was inspected, when, and by whom.

requirements.operationalRequirement: Inspection results must be captured consistently.
requirements.validationRule: Condition Rating and required checklist items must be completed.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Internal summary reflects pass, needs attention, or fail status.

requirements.operationalRequirement: Failed or concerning inspections should create follow-up context.
requirements.formFieldOrBehavior: Priority, Technician Notes, and condition status.
requirements.validationRule: Priority and notes support review when issues are found.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Internal summary flags follow-up needs and operational risk.

requirements.operationalRequirement: Customer sign-off should be captured when the work is complete.
requirements.validationRule: Required before final submission if configured.

requirements.operationalRequirement: Recruiters and reviewers should see structured output.
requirements.validationRule: Generated only after successful form validation.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Shows how form data could feed downstream systems.

requirements.operationalRequirement: Operations teams need a quick internal summary.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Helps internal users understand inspection status quickly.
Provides a nontechnical customer-facing result summary.

dispatchTriage.name: Dispatch Triage
dispatchTriage.description: JSON-driven dispatch board for routing, prioritizing, and assigning field service jobs.

requirements.operationalRequirement: Operations teams need to prioritize incoming service requests.
requirements.formFieldOrBehavior: Triage board with job priority/status indicators.
requirements.validationRule: Jobs must include priority or urgency context.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Internal users can quickly identify which work needs attention first.

requirements.operationalRequirement: Dispatchers need technician and job context.
requirements.formFieldOrBehavior: Technician, job, and routing data displayed from JSON.
requirements.validationRule: Required dispatch fields must exist in the demo data.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Structured data supports routing and assignment decisions.

requirements.operationalRequirement: Routing decisions should be rule-based and explainable.
requirements.formFieldOrBehavior: Routing rules JSON drives job assignment or recommendation logic.
requirements.validationRule: Rules must map to visible routing outcomes.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Reviewer can see how business logic becomes operational output.

requirements.operationalRequirement: High-priority work should be visually clear.
requirements.formFieldOrBehavior: Priority badges, status labels, or highlighted rows/cards.
requirements.validationRule: Priority values must map to UI indicators.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Internal summary helps teams reduce missed urgent work.

requirements.operationalRequirement: Data should remain public-safe and generic.
requirements.formFieldOrBehavior: Sample JSON uses fake jobs, fake technicians, and no real customer records.
requirements.validationRule: No credentials, private data, or backend calls.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Demo can be safely shared on GitHub.

maintenanceRequest.name: Maintenance Request
maintenanceRequest.description: Equipment maintenance intake with conditional escalation for critical or production-impacting issues.

requirements.operationalRequirement: Requestor and location must be captured.
requirements.validationRule: Requestor Name and Location are required.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Submitted data identifies who made the request and where the issue is located.

requirements.operationalRequirement: Equipment ID and category must be captured.
requirements.formFieldOrBehavior: Equipment ID field and Equipment Category dropdown.
requirements.validationRule: Equipment ID and Equipment Category are required.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Internal summary identifies the affected equipment.

requirements.operationalRequirement: Issue type and priority must be categorized.
requirements.formFieldOrBehavior: Issue Type dropdown and Priority dropdown.
requirements.validationRule: Issue Type and Priority are required.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Internal summary highlights the issue category and urgency.

requirements.operationalRequirement: Critical or production-impacting requests must require escalation contact.
requirements.formFieldOrBehavior: Escalation Contact appears when Priority is Critical or Production Impact is checked.
requirements.validationRule: Escalation Contact is required when triggered.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Internal summary flags urgent requests needing escalation.

requirements.formFieldOrBehavior: Internal summary generated from submitted request data.
requirements.validationRule: Generated from priority and production impact fields.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Operations team can quickly identify urgent maintenance needs.

requirements.operationalRequirement: Customer summary should acknowledge request status clearly.
requirements.formFieldOrBehavior: Customer-facing summary generated from request data.
requirements.outputSummaryImpact: Customer receives a clear acknowledgment of the maintenance request.
